title: 2026 Golden Globes Best Drama Actress: Jessie Buckley Wins for Hamnet
text: Jessie Buckley claimed the Golden Globe for Best Actress in a Motion Picture Drama at Sunday's ceremony for her role in Hamnet. During her acceptance speech, Buckley expressed gratitude to the film's cast and crew. She stated: I would rave in that globe for the rest of my life with you, referring to the approximately 400 extras who worked on set alongside the main cast members Chloe, Paul, Maggie, Max, Emily, Jacobi, and Joe. Buckley highlighted the international nature of the production, noting that despite the film telling the story of a famous British historical figure, it featured a Chinese director, Irish cast members, and primarily Polish crew members. The actress also honored her fellow nominees, including Julia Roberts, Tessa Thompson, Renate Reinsve, Eva Victor, and Jennifer Lawrence, calling them incredible women. Hamnet had a successful night overall, securing six nominations and ultimately winning Best Picture—Drama, with Buckley's award preceding that final honor.
